cves.count_rule: F4/F5 omissions and acceptance guards are counted as one concrete failing trigger.
cves.notes: Server authentication bypass with skipped Certificate and CertificateVerify.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one malformed CertificateVerify algorithm value.
cves.notes: CertificateVerify key/algorithm mismatch accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: One modeled renegotiation ClientHello adds signature_algorithms_cert while omitting signature_algorithms.
cves.notes: Handshake-success renegotiation case; the CVE module has no separate target-skip BDS.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one mismatched CertificateVerify algorithm value.
cves.notes: CertificateVerify algorithm/certificate mismatch accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: Omitting the required client CertificateVerify is one concrete F4 trigger.
cves.notes: Client-auth CertificateVerify omission accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: Two HRR-path duplicate cipher-suite lists, each over the four modeled TLS 1.3 cipher suites: 4 x 4.
cves.notes: The source comment describes a crash trigger, but the modeled property reaches V3 closed.

cves.count_rule: Missing required ServerHello key_share is one F2 trigger.
cves.notes: PSK-DHE ServerHello without key_share accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one coherent unoffered TLS 1.2 cipher suite.
cves.notes: Unoffered ServerHello cipher suite accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: Duplicate client_key_share extension over the modeled boolean CKS values: true or false.
cves.notes: Duplicate extension accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one downgraded CertificateVerify algorithm value.
cves.notes: CertificateVerify downgrade accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: Missing required ServerHello key_share is one F2 trigger.
cves.notes: PSK-DHE ServerHello without key_share accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one duplicate key_share group value.
cves.notes: Duplicate ClientHello key_share accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one malformed TLS 1.2 CertificateVerify algorithm value.
cves.notes: TLS 1.2 CertificateVerify algorithm accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: The current CVE model fixes one unoffered ServerKeyExchange signature algorithm.
cves.notes: TLS 1.2 ServerKeyExchange signature algorithm accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: Missing required post-HRR ServerHello key_share is one F2 trigger.
cves.notes: Missing HRR-selected key_share accepted by the target.

cves.count_rule: One modeled cross-version state/session transition trigger.
cves.notes: TLS 1.3 HRR to TLS 1.2 resumption; kept as mixed for aggregation.

excluded.reason: rejection-only wrong-side ClientHello scenario; no handshake-success exploit property

application-data underflow alert/rejection scenario; exploit condition is not handshake success
